Interface IMultiPatch2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that permit controlled access to MultiPatch parts.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("292B91DF-0E21-4489-9F14-CE2C96E9A777")]
public interface IMultiPatch2 : IMultiPatch, IGeometry
